title: StealthX
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Jedi starfighter}} {{StarshipClass |image=[[File:StealthX-EGW.jpg]] |name=StealthX |designer= |manufacturer=[[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] |line=[[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] |model=StealthX starfighter |type=[[Starfighter/Legends|Starfighter]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=Fusial engines (4; retooled to burn [[Tibanna/Legends|TibannaX]]) |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen=Equipped (downgraded) |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures=*[[Sensor/Legends|Sensor]] negators *[[Gravitic amplitude modulator|Gravitic modulator]] (1) *[[Photon absorber]] *[[Thermal dissipator/Legends|Thermal dissipator]] |armament=*[[Laser cannon/Legends|Laser cannons]] (4) *[[Proton torpedo/Legends|Proton torpedo]] launchers (2) Alternatively: *[[Jedi shadow bomb]]s *[[Glop bomb]]s *[[Bunker-buster]] bombs |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew=*[[Pilot/Legends|Pilot]] (1) *[[Astromech droid/Legends|Astromech droid]] (1) |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |availability= |role=*Reconnaissance *Escort |firstuse= |retired= |affiliation=*[[New Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] *[[Jedi Coalition]] }} {{Quote|They're the stealthiest vehicles in the galaxy.''"
"''In space.|Jaina Solo, and Kyp Durron|''[[Fate of the Jedi: Backlash]]''}} The '''StealthX''' was a model of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]] that entered service sometime between the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the [[Killik/Legends|Killik]]-[[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Swarm War|conflict]]. ==Characteristics== {{Quote|A STEALTHX EMITTING COMM WAVES IS NO LONGER A STEALTHX. IT IS JUST A POORLY ARMED, LIGHTLY ARMORED X-WING SAYING ''COME GET ME''.|Rowdy|''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]''}} The StealthX was smaller than the XJ-series X-wing. It featured equipment that hid the craft both visually and from sensors, though the craft's position was given away if [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] were used or if the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] broadcast over the [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]]. The StealthX was used exclusively by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], as the restrictions on comm usage made it nearly impossible for anyone other than a Jedi to coordinate with other forces. The only known use of StealthXs by non-Jedi occurred in [[44 ABY]], when [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]] flew a pair on a mission to retrieve [[Wraith Squadron]] from [[Vandor-3]]. However, they deliberately made no use of the fighter's stealth features, instead using its striking appearance to intimidate their enemies. A modification of the already formidable [[T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter]], the StealthX had a star-flecked body of irregular, matte-black [[Fiberplast/Legends|fiberplast]] that rendered it almost invisible against a background of [[Star/Legends|stars]]. The third torpedo launcher had been replaced by a [[Gravitic amplitude modulator|gravitic modulator]] designed to defeat [[mass-detector]]s, and its [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] had been downgraded to make room for a suite of [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] negators. Even its fusial engines had been retooled to burn a special [[Tibanna/Legends|tibanna]] isotope, designated [[Tibanna/Legends|TibannaX]], whose efflux turned dark a millisecond after fusion. The viewports utilized [[blast-tinting]] technology. The standard proton torpedoes were often replaced with the custom-made [[Jedi shadow bomb]]s, if they were available. The StealthX could also carry [[glop bomb]]s, which released a quick-hardening foam upon detonation, and two-stage armor-piercing [[bunker-buster]] bombs. The advanced [[R9-series astromech droid]]s were assigned to assist the pilots with the special requirements of this unique craft. ==Appearances== {{ScrollBox|content=
